commands.review_summary:
The PR wires Matrix voice-note STT before mention gating, isolates Matrix thread reads/history/replies, adds Matrix QA scenarios, and updates docs.

PR surface: Source +965, Tests +1452, Docs +14. Total +2431 across 30 files.

Reproducibility: yes. From source, a Matrix thread whose root event is a poll start will make `fetchDisplayableThreadRootSummary` return `undefined`, and the subsequent `m.thread` relations query will not include `m.reference` poll response events needed to synthesize the poll summary.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer handling is needed for the P2 poll-root fix and for explicit acceptance of the pre-mention Matrix STT data boundary.

target.title: feat(matrix): handle voice preflight and threads
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds Matrix inbound audio preflight so voice notes can be transcribed before the mention gate, echoed after acceptance, and marked as already transcribed for downstream tools.
- Fixes Matrix thread reads/replies so room reads exclude thread traffic, thread reads use Matrix relations pagination, and outbound thread replies preserve Matrix fallback metadata.
- Adds Matrix QA scenario wiring for voice preflight coverage and documents the Matrix voice-message behavior.

Fixes #78016.
Supersedes #78069 and #71738 with maintainer-owned fixes and real Matrix QA proof.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/matrix-thread-voice.tsbuildinfo`
- `oxfmt --check docs/channels/matrix.md extensions/matrix/src/actions.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/actions/messages.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/media-text.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.audio-preflight.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.group-history.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/preflight-audio.runtime.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/preflight-audio.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/preflight-audio.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/replies.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/replies.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/room-history.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send/formatting.ts extensions/matrix/src/tool-actions.ts extensions/qa-matrix/src/runners/contract/scenario-catalog.ts extensions/qa-matrix/src/runners/contract/scenario-media-fixtures.ts extensions/qa-matrix/src/runners/contract/scenario-runtime-media.ts extensions/qa-matrix/src/runners/contract/scenario-runtime.ts extensions/qa-matrix/src/runners/contract/scenario-types.ts extensions/qa-matrix/src/runners/contract/scenarios.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/matrix`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-matrix/src/runners/contract/scenarios.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean
- AWS Crabbox real Matrix server QA: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_afd9f0439dab`, run `run_8f0cdf1afdb8`, `matrix-thread-follow-up`, `matrix-thread-root-preservation`, `matrix-thread-nested-reply-shape`, `matrix-thread-isolation`, `matrix-room-thread-reply-override`, `matrix-dm-thread-reply-override`, suite `9/9`

- AWS Crabbox live OpenAI voice-STT Matrix QA: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_afd9f0439dab`, run `run_84e8a28342da`, `matrix-voice-preflight-mention`, provider mode `live-frontier`, suite `4/4`
